description_long: This object is a compact, wall-mounted utility sink commonly found in urban garages, maintenance rooms, or outdoor service areas. Its body is primarily constructed from a smooth, light gray plastic or composite material, with a rounded front and a flat rear mounting surface. The top features two prominent black circular fixtures, likely for faucet or control integration, while the front reveals a deep, semi-cylindrical basin with a visible drain opening. The side panels are solid and unadorned, with one side showing a recessed access panel for plumbing or maintenance. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing durability and ease of cleaning. The mounting holes and robust construction suggest it is intended for fixed installation against a wall or vertical surface.
description: A compact, wall-mounted utility sink with a rounded front basin, two black fixture mounts on top, and a smooth, light gray plastic body. Designed for durability and easy cleaning in urban service areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the basin and the partially open front, revealing the interior structure.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the two black circular fixture mounts and the overall rectangular footprint.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the solid, unadorned panel and the overall thickness of the sink.
description_view_3: Front view showing the open basin, drain location, and mounting holes for wall attachment.
